sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The white diamond has moved to where the purple square was. Now I need to find the next waypoint. The dark gray square should still be at ~(59, 27). Let me check the current state to see the full picture.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find key objects
print("=== Key objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'p', 'M', 'G'] and n['pixels'] <= 20:
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = f"~({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})"
        else:
            center = "?"
        print(f"  {c} id={n['id']} px={n['pixels']} children={n['children']} {center}")

# Show adjacency for key objects
print("\n=== Adjacency (key) ===")
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
key_ids = set()
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'p', 'M', 'G', 'w'] and n['pixels'] <= 20:
        key_ids.add(n['id'])
for a in adj:
    if a[0] in key_ids or a[1] in key_ids:
        i, j = a
        ci, cj = nodes[i]['color'], nodes[j]['color']
        pi, pj = nodes[i]['pixels'], nodes[j]['pixels']
        print(f"  {i}({ci},{pi}) - {j}({cj},{pj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
